title: Strong earthquake hits southwest China, thousands evacuated after buildings damaged
summary_full: The Guangxi region of southwest China experienced a severe 5.2-magnitude earthquake, leaving its mark with structural damages and disruption to vital services. Thousands were forced to evacuate as the tremors rattled homes and offices alike. Tragically, authorities reported two lives lost and one individual unaccounted for, prompting active rescue missions.
